tasks.goal: Isolate and quantify six transformer failure modes in a standalone experiment script
acceptance_criteria: Script runs to completion with exit code 0

tasks.goal: Add 4 pytest tests proving the 4 architectural failure modes are detectable
acceptance_criteria: test_no_scaling_reduces_entropy: asserts unscaled entropy < scaled entropy

tasks.goal: Document all 6 failure modes with real numbers from FM-01 output
acceptance_criteria: Real numbers from FM-01 output used (not placeholder values)
Each entry: symptom, root cause, detection method, fix
Training dynamics bugs (BUG 5, BUG 6) included with loss curve data

tasks.goal: Deduplicate inline model definitions in profiling scripts by importing from model.py
acceptance_criteria: Both scripts import GPT and GPTConfig from model.py
No inline Block/MLP/GPT class definitions remain in profiling scripts
Scripts produce identical output before and after refactor
